## VisiumHD

### preamble

```{r load-libs}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(SpatialData)
library(SpatialData.data)
library(SpatialData.plot)
```

```{r load-data}
sd <- MouseIntestineVisHD()
```

```{r}
# simplify lengthly element names
sp <- sd
ex <- "Visium_HD_Mouse_Small_Intestine_"
for (. in c("images", "shapes", "tables")) {
    old <- names(sp[[.]])
    new <- gsub(ex, "", old)
    names(sp[[.]]) <- new
}
show(sp)
```

### analysis

```{r}
# low-resolution image & shape identifiers
i <- grepv("lowres", imageNames(sd))
s <- grepv("_016um", shapeNames(sd))
```

```{r}
cl <- rep(list(c(0, 1/3)), 3) # contrasts
plotSpatialData() + plotImage(sd, i, cl=cl)
```

```{r}
(se <- table(sd))
```

```{r}
# target coordinate space
ct <- "downscaled_lowres" 
# bounding box query
bb <- list(xmin=0, xmax=100, ymin=200, ymax=300)
# apply crop
sp <- crop(sd, bb, j=ct)
```

```{r}
# visualize gene counts spatially
um16 <- grep("16um", shapeNames(sp))
plotSpatialData() + # TODO: legend!
    plotImage(sp, i=i, j=ct, cl=cl) + 
    plotShape(sp, i=s, j=ct, fill="Cd74", col=NA) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors=rev(hcl.colors(9, "RdPu")))
```

```{r}
# rasterization
ex <- extent(image(sp))
ex <- rbind(c(0,200), c(100,200), c(100,300), c(0,200))
ex <- st_sfc(st_polygon(list(ex)))
plot(grid <- st_make_grid(ex, cellsize=10))
```

```{r}
# aggregate data counts by bin
shape(sp, "grid") <- ShapeFrame(st_sf(geometry=grid))
se <- mask(sp, i=s, j="grid", how="sum", name="grid_sum")
table(se, "grid_sum")
```

```{r}
# visualize aggregated counts spatially
plotSpatialData() +
    plotShape(sq, i="grid", fill="Cd74", col="red") +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colors=rev(hcl.colors(9, "RdPu")))
```

### appendix

::: {.callout-note icon=false, collapse=true}

### session

```{r sess-info}
sessionInfo()
```

:::
